reviews.review_text:
It's a nice and well maintsined park. Nice beach front. Short drive to anything you need.

However, would not recommend if you want a quiet family holiday. Pub/hotel directly next door has music until midnight (at least on weekends). People seem to stroll through once it's shut.

Stands are also quite limited, you will need to check what the dimensions are as they all seem to vary.

Beach is nice though..

Had a great stay at this camping park! Beautiful location with lovely water views, very well-kept. The reception staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, especially one lovely lady at the front desk who helped us a lot ❤️

Beautiful spot. Great amenities. Clean and spotless.  Easy entry and exit with our big caravan.
Views, things to do to see.
Ballina a wonderful place overall.
Will be back for sure.

If you want a home away from home... This is the spot for you!
Pet friendly, clean, comfortable and close to everything you need.

What a wonderful location with lovely views, and easy access to walking, swimming or bicycling.  The pub is right next door too, with family-friendly and dog-friendly dining, and there is a pizza/fish and chip shop and a coffee shop close by.  The park is dog-friendly too.  Facilities are kept very clean, even though they are older. And the grounds are well cared for. The pedestrian gate codes are tricky to use and the handles don't all work the same way so be careful not to lock yourself out at night and have to walk all the way around  to the front boom gate.  (Practise opening them in the daylight.)  We have stayed several times in our motorhome on the waterview and waterfront sites and would certainly stay again.
Beautiful caravan park, good clean amenities.  Next door to a newly renovated pub.
Amazing place to stay, great location, cabins were great.

Loved this well kept park. Booked a waterviewsite and didn't dissapoint. Small 'camp kitchen', which was only two bbq and small shelter, no kitchen but very clean. Older amenities kept exceptionally clean. Right next to a pub which was awesome. Midweek quiet, but could hear music on Friday night. Reception was wonderful with all information needed for East Ballina. Great walking paths.
Absolutely stunning location!! I would highly recommend trying to get a waterfront site. Having the beautiful pub right next door just tops everything off

When I rang to make caravan site booking, staff at reflections were very very helpful and the site they selected for us was excellent. Close to Shaw Bay Hotel for excellent meal. Close to water and walking/bike tracks. Couldn't ask for more for a relaxing holiday.
Sites by the bay were magnificent
The staff are super friendly and the location is the best!

Great park and location

We booked so my wife could remember the time she spent there as a early teenager.

Just disappointing that the management let unruly guests play music to a point of constant complaint . Nobody follows the rules nor does the staff enforce them. We went for a relaxing break. I was neary hit 3 times by kids on Ebkes doing wheelies . The park is a bogan feast

It is sad because we had been asked by a major caravan facebook group to review .

We booked into Pottsville on way home
Wished we did it first , no E Bikes or E scooters ,no kids on bikes after 7pm or when street lights are on for their safety, You cant play music that can be heard outside your camp site . Rules are enforced and the park runs like a clock .
Nicest Park we've stayed at and our 2 pups had the best time, thank you 🌟
Expensive but worth it
Absolutely fantastic

Ein perfekter Ort um sich zu erholen. Sehr ruhig und die Aussicht an der Riverside ist wunderschön. Wir haben um eine Nacht verlängert. Rundrum kann man gut spazieren gehen. Auch mit Gehhilfe sehr gut möglich. Gleich in der Nähe ist der Strand zu erreichen. 7 AUS Dollar für eine Ladung in der Waschmaschine erscheint mir ein wenig hoch, aber dafür ist auch ein hot Programm vorhanden. Nebenan ein Hotel mit Biergarten und sehr leckerem Essen. Daneben noch ein Imbiss. Wir können den Platz vorbehaltlos empfehlen.

Fantastic location. We had a luxury cabin overlooking the water, a couple of minutes walk to Shaw's bay.
If you want a drink ir a meal the Shaw's Bay hotel is next door, so no worries about drink driving.
We had 5 adults in our party so we reserved the luxury cabin, which had everything from a washing machine to a coffee machine
A very relaxing place to stay

Beautiful location with frontage to both the bay and river. The drive through sites are spacious and the amenities were always clean. Ladies in the office were friendly and obliging.
Only downside, which is no reflection on the Park, is the hotel next door. Very noisy particularly on Friday and Saturday nights. The Managers and staff are obviously deaf and are trying to inflict the same condition on everyone else in the neighbourhood.

Ww love this caravan park. The views are lovely from our spot. The office staff were friendly and helpful.
We will be returning. Just a note to remember- November is a windy time of the year.

Great caravan park. Not big and has drive through sites. Selection of riverside sites. Also has cabins.
Close to beach which is perfect for children and big people. No dogs on this beach area. Has great cycle paths so bring your bikes.
Pub next door and an amazing takeaway shop.
Caravan park feels safe and is well maintained.
Great little caravan Park. Very helpful staff. Couldn't be happier with our site 😍

My stay was very stressful due to lack of sleep due to continuous Loud music from the Hotel directly next door. I stayed three nights Friday Saturday and Sunday.  Music was played on Friday night till late, Saturday night till late and all Sunday afternoon.|The music was so loud I couldn’t hear my TV. |The park itself is great it’s just the noise from where I was parked directly next to Hotel.|I would like to return to the park but w old stay furtherest away from the Hotel.

This park is clean and tidy. It is a little expensive,  however,  reflects the prices of the area. |Our cabin was clean and offered towels, some toiletries, tea, coffee, milk, and biscuits. |The beds and pillows are comfortable.  |Close to Shaw's Bay Hotel.
Caravan, powered site on the waterfront.
stunning , dog friendly, plenty of places to walk the dog , very clean amenities , highly recommended

Lovely clean caravan park, but unless you like doof music at an extreme volume level from the Shaws Bay Hotel next door, within 100 metres,  continuously from 6pm to 9pm on a Friday night STAY AWAY! This noise totally ruined our stay!
Beautiful spot, large drive through sites...receptionist was so helpful.
Staff very welcoming and accommodating. Invited to a BBQ fo lunch ru ok day. Cabin, little run down, but still liveable condition, comfortable nights sleep.

Firstly would like to give a huge thank you to Carren, her service was amazing!!!’
She went out of her way to make sure she could accomodate our needs and went over and above to make it happen. You don’t find great service like this anymore! She is an absolute gem!!!
The park was great. Clean, friendly and close to the water! We stayed in a cabin with a dog and it was great.
Overall the park was great with a mixture of cabins and sites.
Its a great spot and we will be returning again. With a great park and Carren looking after your guests you can’t go wrong!!!
Please ensure Carren gets the feedback on her outstanding people skills and care she shows!

Bitterly disappointed on arriving at Ballina's popular Reflections Shaws Bay Caravan Park in our caravan to realise they had changed their policy to allow dogs into the park. The sheer number of dogs and their constant barking ruined our five-night stay and we were glad to leave. We immediately cancelled another two-week stay at the park in September on returning home. I was awoken on at least two mornings by barking dogs on nearby campsites, despite the parks pet policy clearly stating dog owners must ensure their pets do not create a noise nuisance for other guests. We have stayed at pet-friendly parks before but this was by far the noisiest we have ever experienced. Be warned, nearly all Reflections caravan parks on the NSW North Coast now allow dogs and if they are all as poorly policed as Shaws Bay best avoided if you are no fan of barking dogs
I was most impressed 👌 👏
Nice spot, plenty of paved walking, newly renovated pub next door, also cafe, opens early
The staff were the most helpful and friendly we have come across. Beautifully positioned and the site was well laid out and maintained.

Amazing! I had a last minute mini break with my dog. I have visited Ballina/Shaws Bay for many years. I wish I had stayed here sooner.
Amazing customer service. I received a text message to say my cabin was cleaned and available to check in. The young lady at reception was so polite and was genuinely interested in my dog. My cabin was perfect (Cabin 5 with a carpark). It was so clean and tidy and a perfect size for me and my boy. The balcony was huge and secure. Inside was clean, tidy and had a very comfortable bed.
Location is perfect for dog activities. There is a perfect dog beach a short walk over the bridge.
A lovely coffee shop and fish and chip shop within a 2 minute walk.
Wonderful. Thank you so much for a wonderful stay. I have already booked my next stay.

We have loved the area quiet and a bit out of the town. You have a lot of walkable areas around and also food next door |The camping is small just close to the water|Amenities are very clean|The spaces are a bit to small for me, that s a a city camping. The premium sites on the second line don’t worth the price at all. With all caravan and cars in front of you
A great location but amenities and cabins are very basic.
The cabins were really lovely, they had everything we needed and then some. There were 4 adults and a toddler in our cabin but there was plenty of room.
Great holiday location

The view was great, and the cabin was clean. The biggest issue was there was no wifi. When I asked for assistance with this issue, staff were aware that this was a problem. I was told that I should be able to access wifi from the deck... I could not!  Holidaying with a child who has ASD can be challenging, and not having wifi is a deal breaker for us!
Plenty to do there great staff

Great place to stay with the Shaw Bay as you back yard. Coffee shop and take away out front of the park.
Shaw’s Bay Hotel next door. Unfortunately closed for renovations, but a great place for food,drinks and entertainment.
Enjoyed our stay here. Very friendly staff. Ballina is lovely. Great pizza 🍕 next door.

Worst CP we have ever stayed at . Booked for a 7.5m van and got allocated a 7m spot with no room to park our vehicle . Crammed in like sardines so badly we had to get guests across from us to all move their vehicles to park. Staff took no responsibility  for their error and told us to park our vehicle out on the road . Or pay another $420 to move to another site which they couldn’t guarantee was free for the whole duration of our stay. The beach and park areas does not allow dogs despite being next to the beach. On departure we had to enlist several guests to help us manually move the van out of site to be able to hitch it to our vehicle. The sites are so tiny we almost backed into someone’s awning and we could all literally hear each other inside our vans. Just a shocking set up and no care factor by the management . Will not go back

We stayed here in our caravan. Staff were excellent. The location is ideal and next to a lake and the river. Also very close to the famous Ballina parkrun. The only problem was the lights in the amenities blocks keep turning off leaving customers fumbling in the dark in the toilet cubicles. This only saves them about $1 a year in electricity.
Great location, really helped us out with last minute booking as we had a dog travelling with us. Right on the waters edge, fantastic views and impeccable facilities. Would definitely recommend.

We stayed here for two nights in our motorhome with our dog. The park has all your basic facilities. The star attraction of this park, in my opinion, is its location. You are in good walking distance or better with bicycles, like us, to various beaches, waterways, eateries, and general site seeing such as the sea wall with its full length paved walk and cycle way.
The park caters well for people with dogs. Our dog made herself quite at home and was able to read the signs and knew what to do............
Great van park absolutely fantastic location great for us oldies loved it will be back
There is some really helpful staff and good fishing in Shaw's Bay.

Absolutely amazing
Thanks to reception, Dee, for being so welcoming.
I'll be back!

A great spot on Shaws Bay.|Immaculate facilities and well maintained grounds.|All staff were very friendly.|Love the fact it is dog friendly.|Handy to everything.|Great walking trails.|Ballina is a lovely town and a great place to base yourself to explore the area.
We stayed in our caravan on a premium waterside  site.  Amenities very clean and tidy. Staff were very friendly.  We will be back.

Location on the banks of a bay with great beach. Great views all around. Within city but still quiet with lots of privacy. Great cafe and Pizza house besides. All amenities are well maintained and clean. Helpful staff. Loads of walks and activities to do.
Great location, next to Waters and great walk. Rooms are bit small, but with sufficient amenities.
Loved it. Thanks. Next time hopefully.

I stayed here last night it was great budget accommodation is great clean and tidy and you can go to water
And it's safe to swim in and fishing.it has a pool and putt-putt worth a stop over there and the rates are good
Enjoyed our stay again at this park. Great location with easy access to walking paths. Easy walk to town centre. Great views over Shaw’s Bay. Would stay again when in the area
Pleasant staff good location
Great spot
Great holiday destination, close to the water and easy access for dog walks!
Will come back

"An unforgettable experience! Our stay at Reflections Shaws Bay - Holiday Park in Ballina exceeded all expectations. The location right by the beautiful Shaws Bay was simply breathtaking, offering stunning views and peaceful surroundings. The park facilities were fantastic, with clean amenities and a range of activities for both adults and children. The staff were exceptionally friendly and accommodating, ensuring that our stay was comfortable and enjoyable. Whether you're looking for relaxation or adventure, this park has it all. We can't wait to return! Five stars without a doubt."
Nice park except for all the barking dogs, can’t sleep in.
It was a great location for us

Absolutely exceptional.  Great location overlooking Shaws Bay.  Best weather.  Our fur babies loved it.  The camp grounds are well looked after.  Everything nice and green.  But there is a walk for a dog beach..
We have stayed at this park twice, but am falling in love with it. We have just booked 3 more holidays there. Great Park. Great amenities & very friendly staff. Recommend.
Great spot but geez it eas busy , school holiday chaos
Great little spot, don't forget to pack the areoguard if staying on the water sites

The location is great, the front desk staff were great and helpful. We stayed in a cabin. The room while, clean was a bit run down and showing signs of needing renovation. The cost is too high for a park that doesn't have things like a pool, games/activities room.

Great location situated on the beautiful Shaw's Bay.
Stayed on a bay view site, which was really picturesque and calming. $70 plus / night is expensive however, which is the only negative for me.
5 minutes to Ballina central shopping or Ballina Fair.
We'll worth the visit.
Great location, staff were friendly and helpful. Our pup loved it too.
It was a great place, awesome views. This is the spot for us. Chilled. Coming back very soon, already booked.
Needs a bit of upkeep.with flooring when entering the front door..A blind on eastern side non existent.
I didn't here. !!
Always stay at the Shawsy.

Great location overlooking Shaw's Bay.
Our pup loved it as well.
Weather could have been nicer for us, but hey, it's better than being at home!
A good place to stay in Ballina, water views from most sites and cabins. It is also dog friendly with parks and beaches nearby.

We stayed at this caravan park mainly because it was dog friendly. Our pet pooch was recuperating from a recent operation & we wanted a place with beach walks & swimming. This park ticked all the boxes. Walking distance to everything we needed. Also, the cabin was reasonably clean & tidy with good cooking facilities.

I ride past on a push bike 🚲 some days
Great

Perfect location! Right next to the water, which makes it super ideal. Some cabins may not get the best view of the water although still worth it, stayed here for over two nights and was very enjoyable.

Interior of the cabin was nice although a little small that’s okay as we stayed in a smaller one, if I was to come back I would stay longer so I can use the stove and fridge better. The shower however was quite small but that’s fine.

The staff were absolutely lovely and were very welcoming and kinda and suggested I should come back and stay in a deluxe cabin! Haha
Urunga caravan park, the amenities were far to get away, dangerous at 3am in the morning , very unsafe
Great location, very good facilities, van sites are well set up.
Great location, neat and tidy caravan park. Amenities OK, clean. Some of the sites are a bit small and parking your vehicle can be difficult, but overall excellent place for a holiday.
Pretty good would recommend
Absolutely exceptional, we stayed at one the cabins facing the north wall, all needs were accommodated. Nice rear alfresco with built in barbeque. My only regret - I did not book for longer.
Cabin right by the little bay. Kids loved it! I could have a cuppa on little balcony and watch the kids on the sand. Great break and we will be back.
Good spot
Really nice holiday park. Great location. Clean amenities.

These comments,are based on staying atcotger cabins in nsw...no electric blankets,no hair dryer,no bedside lights..poor selection of accommodation and very costly..great location esp if you live loyd music from the hotel next door...wouldn't stay again..had to book for 3 nights for a cycling camp
